result.stdout:
toggl.normalize-bom-and-eol 3.0.0
Copyright (C) 2026 Toggl OU

  -e                         (Default: LF) Line ending (Values: CR | LF | CRLF)

  -f, --files                (Group: source) The paths to the files to normalize

  -i, --from-input-stream    (Group: source) Indicates that the paths to the
                             files to be normalized are read from the standard
                             input stream (path per line).

  -c, --from-config-file     (Group: source) Specifies the configuration file
                             that contains the paths to the files to be
                             normalized (path per line).

  -s, --stop-on-error        Determines whether to stop processing if an error
                             is encountered.

options.description: The paths to the files to normalize
Specifies the configuration file that contains the paths to the files to be normalized (path per line).
Indicates that the paths to the files to be normalized are read from the standard input stream (path per line).
Determines whether to stop processing if an error is encountered.
